purpose: Content-layer safety guardrails complementing process-layer drift controls. Input and output guardrails run on every relevant run transition.

nemo_guardrails.strength: Declarative Colang rules; input/output/dialog three-layer guard; NIM microservice deployment.
nemo_guardrails.use_for: Enterprise deployments needing declarative topic and safety rules.

openai_agents_guardrails.strength: First-class input/output guardrail primitives integrated with handoff.
openai_agents_guardrails.use_for: Lightweight guardrails co-located with agent definitions.

selection_guidance: Pick one implementation. NeMo for declarative enterprise rules; OpenAI Agents SDK guardrails for lightweight co-located guards. Custom guard layers must satisfy the check contracts above.
